scripts.dev:backend:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conns = netstat -ano | Select-String ':3100'; if ($conns) { $pidList = $conns | ForEach-Object { ($_.ToString().Trim() -split '\s+')[-1] } | Sort-Object -Unique | Where-Object { $_ -ne '0' }; foreach ($procId in $pidList) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; npm -w backend run dev"
